floor_history.headline: Recon: vT40 floor=4 reproduces on main (canonical C, 178/179); the handoff's active lever (rich-pass permuter workspace + triage + all session-10 tooling) was LOST with the bb2-work-marion worktree an

Structural axis for the pair-swap measured CLOSED: 26 forms swept (geometry/decl-order/type/staging), floor stays 4; NEW mechanism fact — shift-merged-into-load geometry moves the sched2 tie WITHOUT t

Structural s3: decoupled-addu family measured DEAD (22 new forms); pair-swap seat-trade proven invariant to deref position, arg5val life, web decomposition, and plus-operand canonicalization - addu-ea

frontier.hypothesis: The unknown original source shape is findable by the rebuilt rich-pass permuter campaign on the vT40 base (unchanged - still the ONE active lever; the hand-structural space is now closed from s2's 26 + s3's 22 directions)

frontier.next_probe: rebuild in tmp/grind/marionation_Exec/s4/: preprocess vT40 body to base.c, single-function offset-0 target.o from asm/funcs/marionation_Exec.s + prelude.inc (drop .set gp=64), permuter_annotate rich PERM_* pass, --stop-on-zero + watcher; triage sub-200 finds with s2's adiff.py - check the 55-57 window order AND seats first, then region-3 at 149

frontier.hypothesis: Pair-swap via hand-derived C is CLOSED (do not re-attempt): any closure must arrive as a sampler find whose 55-57 window shows (sll v0; addu; sll a0) with t0-web in a0 and arg5val in v1
frontier.mechanism: s3 hardened s2's closure: addu-LUID-early forces the seat trade in every fused, decoupled, merged, and array-indexed spelling, at every deref position; 3-stmt staging webs head-retime at 17 position-invariantly

frontier.next_probe: no independent probe - adiff.py the tail region (insn 149) of any sub-200 sampler find before scoring the rest

judge_constraints: FINAL owner ruling 2026-07-06 (do-while-zero-exception.md): do-while(0) sanctioned for ANY codegen effect incl. RA weighting, mandatory inline FAKE annotation; nested wraps additionally need a single-level-insufficient justification. The interim not-sanctioned ruling is superseded. STILL FORBIDDEN: regfix, register pins, __asm__ injection, semantic-lie C (cross-symbol derivation, per 2026-07-05).

candidate.c = vT40 (masked 4, verified): layer-1 review round-3 verdict was PASS-except-one — the NESTED wrap at line ~111 was held NEEDS_USER at the time; under the FINAL ruling it needs a documented single-level-insufficient justification (vT44 battery was staged to eliminate it entirely — check evidence). The Judge must independently verify that justification or its elimination.

Residual gap is 2 root-caused items (see evidence: pair-swap @56/57 coupled fixed point — sched2 LUID tie + qty_compare 5.33v5.33 tie; wrap toolbox measured DEAD for this pair). Do NOT re-derive the 140-ordering sweep, the 9-variant topology sweep, or the cc1psx parity test — all closed negative. Active lever at handoff: rich-pass permuter on the vT40 base.

STRATEGY (fable-blitz 2026-07-07): develop the exchange lever on the CHEAPER twin cpu_side_move_dir_4 FIRST (its ip/g3 residual is the exchange alone; masked ~6->0 on flip), then mirror here. The decisive allocation-equation material is in pre-merge commits aa8cad24 cd65f9c2 e5aa2dd4 f4bc8e67 df749bfd 622620cb (sessions 6f-6h: in-place basin correction, final qty_compare equation, s4 half-flip) — NOT fully represented in this ledger's s1-s3; read those commits before another permuter campaign.
